title: rubus neopyramidalis
intro: Rubus neopyramidalis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Rubus neopyramidalis include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Rubus neopyramidalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues.
